title: carex marina subsp. marina
intro: Carex marina subsp. marina, also known as sea sedge or coastal sedge, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its saponins and other compounds. The health benefits of Carex marina subsp. marina include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. Carex marina subsp. marina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
